about.title: About IAPME Suisse
about.mission_text: Making artificial intelligence accessible and valuable to all Swiss SMEs, regardless of their size or industry.
about.why_title: Why Switzerland needs AI for its SMEs
about.why_text: Switzerland is home to over 600,000 SMEs, representing 99% of its economic fabric. In the face of the AI revolution, these businesses must adapt to remain competitive. IAPME Suisse guides them through this transition.

values.title: Swissness
values.description: Quality, reliability and discretion. Made in Switzerland.

founder.name: Laurent Duplat
founder.bio: 10+ years of experience in digital strategy and automation. Laurent supports Swiss SMEs in the concrete adoption of AI tools: maturity audit, team training, integration of ChatGPT, Copilot, Claude and tailor-made workflows. Pragmatic approach, nLPD and AI Act compliance, measurable ROI within 4 to 12 weeks.

faq.question: Is AI suitable for small businesses?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Many AI tools are accessible and affordable, even for micro-businesses. The key is identifying the right use cases.

faq.question: comment cadrer AI integration cost?
faq.answer: Costs vary depending on the complexity of the project. An initial audit helps assess the necessary investments and expected ROI.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills?
faq.answer: No. Our training programmes are designed for all levels. We guide your teams every step of the way.

faq.question: How long does an integration take?
faq.answer: A simple project can be up and running within a few weeks. More complex projects typically span 2-3 months.

faq.question: Does my data stay in Switzerland?
faq.answer: We prioritise data-protection-compliant solutions. We advise you on best practices for confidentiality and privacy.

privacy.meta_description: Privacy policy in compliance with the Swiss nFADP.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: IAPME Suisse is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the new Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP), effective since 1 September 2023.
privacy.data_collected_text: We collect the following data via our contact form: full name, email address, company name and message. This data is collected solely to respond to your enquiry.
privacy.purpose_text: Your personal data is used exclusively to respond to your contact requests, provide information about our services and improve our offerings.
privacy.retention_text: Your data is retained for the duration necessary to process your request and for a maximum of 2 years after last contact.
privacy.rights_text: Under the nFADP, you have the right to access, rectification, deletion, data portability and objection. Contact: contact@iapmesuisse.ch
privacy.cookies_text: This site uses only technically necessary cookies. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.transfer_text: The site is hosted by Vercel Inc. (USA). Adequate protection measures are in place in compliance with the nFADP.
privacy.update_text: IAPME Suisse reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time.

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.scope_text: These terms apply to all services offered by IAPME Suisse.
terms.services_text: IAPME Suisse offers consulting, training and integration services in artificial intelligence for Swiss SMEs. The exact scope is defined in a specific quote or contract.
terms.pricing_text: Each engagement is scoped privately according to your workflows, data and priorities.
terms.cancellation_text: Cancellations must be communicated in writing at least 5 business days before the scheduled date.
terms.confidentiality_text: IAPME Suisse treats all information provided by clients in the course of services as confidential.
terms.liability_text: IAPME Suisse's liability is limited to the amount of the service in question.
terms.law_text: These terms are governed by Swiss law.

faq_page.title: Frequently asked questions about AI for SMEs
faq_page.subtitle: Everything you need to know about integrating AI into your Swiss SME

items.question: Is AI suitable for small businesses?
items.answer: Absolutely. Tools such as ChatGPT, DeepL and Zapier are available custom project scope, improve customer service or accelerate content creation.

items.question: Where should I start with AI in my SME?
items.answer: Begin with a process audit: identify repetitive, time-consuming or low-value tasks. Our free audit helps you prioritise opportunities.

items.question: Do I need technical skills?
items.answer: No. Most modern AI tools are designed to be used without programming skills. Our training programmes guide you every step of the way.

items.question: Will AI replace my employees?
items.answer: AI is an augmentation tool, not a replacement. It frees your staff custom project scope.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: We favour solutions compliant with the nFADP (Swiss data protection law). We advise you on choosing privacy-respecting tools.

items.question: What is the nFADP?
items.answer: The new Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP), in force since 1 September 2023, strengthens individuals' rights and businesses' obligations regarding personal data.

items.question: comment cadrer an AI project for an SME cost?
items.answer: Costs range custom project scope) to custom project scope (bespoke integration). Our express audit at custom project scope provides a precise ROI estimate.

items.question: How long does an integration project take?
items.answer: A straightforward project (e.g. chatbot, email automation) can be operational within 2-4 weeks. More complex projects span 2-3 months.

items.question: Do you offer training in German and Italian?
items.answer: Yes, our services are available in French, German, Italian and English. We cover all linguistic regions of Switzerland.

items.question: How can I fund my AI project?
items.answer: Several cantons offer digitalisation grants for SMEs (ZH, VD, GE, BE, etc.). We help you identify available funding in your region.
